title: Event Settings
description: Configure your event details, visibility, distances, and registration settings.

wizard.title: Finish setting up your event
wizard.description: Add your first distance, then publish when you are ready to share.
wizard.stepZeroDescription: Choose how you want to set up this event first. You can switch paths at any time.

pathHint.ai: AI path selected. Use the assistant to draft updates, then continue editing manually as needed.
pathHint.manual: Manual path selected. Fill each section directly and switch to AI anytime.

issues.missingEventDate: Add an event start date to keep setup on track.
issues.missingEventLocation: Add an event location (city/state or map location).
issues.missingDistance: Add at least one distance for this edition.
issues.publishMissingDistance: Publish blocked: add at least one distance before publishing.
issues.publishMissingPricing: Publish blocked: each distance needs at least one price tier.
issues.recommendFaq: Recommended: add at least one FAQ item to answer common participant questions.
issues.recommendWaivers: Recommended: add a waiver so participants can acknowledge event terms.
issues.recommendQuestions: Recommended: add registration questions for logistics and participant preferences.
issues.recommendWebsite: Recommended: add website content so participants can review event details.
issues.recommendAddOns: Recommended: configure add-ons if you plan to offer extras.
issues.recommendPolicies: Recommended: review refund/transfer/deferral policies before publishing.

adaptive.title: Adaptive next steps
adaptive.description: Prioritized guidance from your current setup state.

wizard.assistantHint: Need help with setup? Use the assistant to draft suggested changes.

steps.distance: Add at least one distance with pricing.
steps.publish: Publish the event to make it visible.

assistant.title: Setup assistant
assistant.description: Describe your event in one message. I’ll propose changes you can review and apply.
assistant.contract: I only suggest updates. Nothing changes until you apply each proposal.

composer.label: Message for setup assistant
composer.hint: Include date, city, distances, and pricing so I can draft accurate updates.

assistant.placeholder: Tell me about your event (date, city, distances, pricing)...

empty.heading: Try one of these:
empty.example: Half marathon in Guadalajara on March 15, 2026. Add a 5K and 10K. Pricing: 350 and 450 MXN.

errors.title: Assistant error
errors.proRequired: Setup assistant is a Pro feature.
errors.rateLimited: Too many assistant requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

safety.promptInjection: Your request triggered a safety guard for prompt-injection patterns.
safety.policyViolation: Your request triggered a content policy safety block.

errors.partialApplied: Some changes were applied, but something failed. Please review your event settings.
errors.failed: Could not apply changes. Please try again.

visibility.title: Event Visibility
visibility.description: Control who can see and access your event. Published events appear in the public directory.

errors.missingDistances: Add at least one distance before publishing.
errors.missingPrices: Add at least one price for every distance before publishing.
errors.generic: Unable to update visibility. Please try again.

registration.title: Registration Status
registration.description: Pause or resume registration for this event. Paused events won't accept new registrations.

heroImage.title: Hero image
heroImage.description: Show a wide image on your event page and directory card.

errors.invalidType: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save the hero image.

capacity.title: Capacity settings
capacity.description: Choose whether capacity is per distance or shared across the event.
capacity.toggleHelp: When enabled, all distances pull from one shared pool.
capacity.sharedCapacityHelp: Total registrants allowed across all distances.

errors.required: Enter a total capacity to enable shared pool mode.

descriptionField.label: Event description
descriptionField.help: Give participants a clear overview of the event.

details.title: Event Details
details.slugRedirectInfo: Old edition links are automatically forwarded to the new URL.

slugConfirm.title: Update edition URL?
slugConfirm.description: We’ll automatically forward your old edition links to the new URL, so existing shares and marketing keep working.

distances.title: Distances
distances.empty: No distances added yet. Add your first distance to enable registration.
distances.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this distance? This action cannot be undone.
